results.test_code:
# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_initialize_message_sequence_boot_messages_are_model_dependent__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/memgpt/agent.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'def initialize_message_sequence(' in source, 'Expected initialize_message_sequence to exist in /workspace/memgpt/agent.py'

def test_initialize_message_sequence_boot_messages_are_model_dependent__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/memgpt/agent.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    sig_match = re.search('def\\s+initialize_message_sequence\\s*\\((.*?)\\)\\s*:', source, flags=re.S)
    assert sig_match, 'Could not locate initialize_message_sequence(...) signature'

def test_initialize_message_sequence_boot_messages_are_model_dependent__a3():
    source = open('/workspace/memgpt/agent.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    sig_match = re.search('def\\s+initialize_message_sequence\\s*\\((.*?)\\)\\s*:', source, flags=re.S)
    sig_args = sig_match.group(1)
    assert re.search('(^|[\\s,])model([\\s,]|$)', sig_args), 'initialize_message_sequence should accept a `model` parameter so boot message choice can be model-dependent'

def test_initialize_message_sequence_boot_messages_are_model_dependent__a4():
    source = open('/workspace/memgpt/agent.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    sig_match = re.search('def\\s+initialize_message_sequence\\s*\\((.*?)\\)\\s*:', source, flags=re.S)
    sig_args = sig_match.group(1)
    assert "if 'gpt-3.5' in model" in source, "Expected model-dependent boot message selection: `if 'gpt-3.5' in model:`"

def test_initialize_message_sequence_boot_messages_are_model_dependent__a5():
    source = open('/workspace/memgpt/agent.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    sig_match = re.search('def\\s+initialize_message_sequence\\s*\\((.*?)\\)\\s*:', source, flags=re.S)
    sig_args = sig_match.group(1)
    assert "get_initial_boot_messages('startup_with_send_message_gpt35')" in source, "Expected GPT-3.5-specific boot messages: get_initial_boot_messages('startup_with_send_message_gpt35')"

def test_initialize_message_sequence_boot_messages_are_model_dependent__a6():
    source = open('/workspace/memgpt/agent.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    sig_match = re.search('def\\s+initialize_message_sequence\\s*\\((.*?)\\)\\s*:', source, flags=re.S)
    sig_args = sig_match.group(1)
    assert "get_initial_boot_messages('startup_with_send_message')" in source, "Expected non-GPT-3.5 default boot messages: get_initial_boot_messages('startup_with_send_message')"
